Who's Behind HelpmeNapoli

An American in Naples —
who actually lives here

I'm not a travel blogger passing through. I'm a dual US-Italian citizen who made Naples my home and spent years learning how this city ticks — the bureaucracy, the hidden gems, the shortcuts, the pitfalls. I built HelpmeNapoli so you can benefit from all of it.

  • Dual US–Italian citizen with lived experience in Naples
  • English-speaking guide for tourists and expats alike
  • Deep local network — lawyers, fixers, insiders
  • Honest, no-fluff advice — I tell you what you actually need to know
Work With Me

What I Do

Three ways I can help you

Whether you're visiting for a week, dreaming of staying longer, or just trying to figure out where to eat — I've got you covered.

🧭

Courses & Experiences

English-led experiences that go beyond the tourist trail. Street food crawls, neighborhood walks, wine tastings — designed to show you the Naples that locals actually live in.

Book an Experience →
🗺️

Local Concierge & Planning

Not sure where to stay, eat, or how to get around? I'll build you a custom Naples plan — restaurants, logistics, neighborhoods — tailored to who you actually are.

Get a Custom Plan →
🗝️

Relocation & Expat Onboarding

Ready to actually live here? I help Americans navigate the move — finding an apartment, setting up residency, healthcare, banking, and everything else that nobody tells you about until you're already stuck.

Start the Conversation →

🇮🇹  Pursuing Italian citizenship? We run a dedicated service for that.

Visit ItalianToBe.com →
